data.body:
VERIFICATION_RESULT: pass

dso:completion-verifier (opus) dispatched post-closure (hybrid mode — child stories were closed without per-story verifier dispatches).

overall_verdict: PASS (7/7 SCs, 3/3 consumer smoke tests)
- SC1 PASS: gh repo view shows visibility=PUBLIC; git ls-remote returns refs/heads/tickets=1c736bf
- SC2 PASS: strip-list grep returns 0 (NOTICE excluded per contract); CODEOWNERS removed, SECURITY.md replaced, renovate.json removed; only ci.yml in workflows; no nava-platform refs
- SC3 PASS: all 7 DSO infra files present and sized; dso.plugin_root= empty; zero TODO/TBD/<FILL IN> markers
- SC4 PASS (infrastructure-verified; literal under-10-minute timing requires human run on fresh macOS): /dso:roadmap named as first command in CLAUDE.md line 25 + README.md line 25; no /dso:onboarding or /dso:architect-foundation prompts; no stub markers; installer launches Claude Code as terminal step
- SC5 PASS: 17/17 real-URL e2e assertions pass including substitution-fidelity
- SC6 PASS: LICENSE unmodified Apache-2.0; NOTICE pins SHA a0ca4c91 + date 2026-04-19 + modifications + §4 retention clause; README line 65 links NOTICE
- SC7 PASS: tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app-real-url.sh exercises real git clone (no PATH-stubbing); .github/workflows/template-real-url-e2e.yml runs daily + workflow_dispatch + tag-push; bug 068c-1e8a closed

Consumer smoke tests:
- create-dso-app installer + live template e2e: PASSED 17/17
- template repo no-auth git clone: success
- tickets orphan branch ls-remote: returns 1c736bf

Minor non-blocking note from verifier: closure comment cited docs/onboarding.md as updated in the template — that edit was actually in the host project (not in the fork). SC4 still passes via fork's README + CLAUDE.md which both feature /dso:roadmap as the first command.

remediation_tasks_created: [] (none)
